name: Delete CloudTrail Trail
description: Simulates an attacker permanently deleting a CloudTrail trail to eliminate audit logging for subsequent actions. This is the most destructive CloudTrail evasion technique — the trail cannot be recovered.
prerequisites: CloudTrail trail (stratus-red-team-ct-delete-trail) with associated S3 bucket
detection_signal: cloudtrail:DeleteTrail — extremely high signal, near-certain indicator of malicious intent; should trigger immediate incident response
